description: Translate small visible Faction info descriptions and the enemy relationship sentence on Faction pages.
scope: Small Faction infoText descriptions, especially city and early Faction pages, plus the visible enemy relationship sentence

operations.source: "The East Asian Order of the Future."
infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Asia's World City."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Wealthy residents of ",i.CityName.NewTokyo," may be invited to work for Asia's World City.")
operations.target: infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"아시아의 세계 도시."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Wealthy residents of ",i.CityName.NewTokyo," may be invited to work for Asia's World City.")

operations.source: infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Benefit, Honor, and Glory."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Wealthy residents of ",i.CityName.Volhaven," may be invited to work for the city's Benefit, Honor, and Glory.")
operations.target: infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"이익, 명예, 그리고 영광."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Wealthy residents of ",i.CityName.Volhaven," may be invited to work for the city's Benefit, Honor, and Glory.")

operations.source: "Following the mandate of Heaven and carrying out the way."
"It is better to reign in Hell than to serve in Heaven."
"The World doesn't care about right or wrong. It only cares about power."
operations.target: "세상은 옳고 그름에 관심이 없다. 오직 힘에만 관심이 있다."

operations.source: infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"Obey Heaven and work righteously."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"A Chinese honor society with the motto: “Obey Heaven and work righteously.”")
operations.target: infoText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"하늘에 따르고 의롭게 일하라."),rumorText:r.createElement(r.Fragment,null,"A Chinese honor society with the motto: “Obey Heaven and work righteously.”")

verification.expectedVisualChange: Faction page top descriptions for city and early Factions should render in Korean. Enemy relationship text should use a Korean label while Faction names remain unchanged.
knownRemaining: Longer Faction lore descriptions and rumor/invitation text are intentionally left for later Faction lore sweeps.
Faction names and gameplay terms Faction/Augmentation/BitNode are preserved.
